LeaderboardEntry.description: One predictor's standings, aggregated per pre-registration stratum.

evaluators.description: Distinct evaluators that scored this predictor
evaluators.title: Evaluators

forward.description: True forward forecasts — the event was unresolved when the prediction was committed. The only stratum that measures forecasting skill; null until this predictor has a scored forward cell.

retrospective.description: Events already resolved when the prediction was committed: measures calibration and label-mapping fit, not forecasting skill; null when this predictor has no scored retrospective cell.

LeaderboardEntry.title: LeaderboardEntry

LeaderboardStratum.description:
Aggregates over one pre-registration stratum of a predictor's evaluations.

A cell is *forward* when the event was still unresolved at the prediction's
commit time and *retrospective* when it had already resolved — in which case
the outcome is public knowledge inside every modern model's training data, so
the cell measures recall plus calibration, never ex-ante forecasting skill.
The strata are therefore aggregated separately and never blended into one
headline number.

mean_brier_score.description: Mean Brier score where reported (lower is better)
mean_brier_score.title: Mean Brier Score

LeaderboardStratum.title: LeaderboardStratum

description:
``metrics/leaderboard.json`` — predictors ranked from the evaluations ledger.

A deterministic, offline roll-up of every ``evaluation.json`` under ``data/``:
one entry per predictor, ranked best-first on the **forward** stratum (see
:class:`LeaderboardStratum` — forward and retrospective cells are never
blended into one number). Computed by ``fedcourts leaderboard``; carries no
timestamp so the same ledger always serializes identically.

predictors_ranked.description: Number of predictors on the board
predictors_ranked.title: Predictors Ranked

title: Leaderboard
